description.value:
Shrine World

Shrine worlds are planets devoted to the worship of the God-Emperor, often built around sites of great religious significance. Every aspect of life revolves around faith, devotion, and the rituals of the Imperial Creed. Those raised on shrine worlds possess an unshakeable faith and iron will, though their cloistered upbringing can leave them naive about the wider galaxy and its dangers.

Homeworld Bonus

+Fellowship, +Willpower, –Perception

Homeworld Aptitude

Willpower

Wounds

8+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 6+)

Starting Skills

Common Lore (Imperial Creed)

Starting Talent

Choose one: Weapon Training (choice)

Homeworld Trait

Faith in the Creed: A shrine world character gains a +10 bonus to Fear Tests and when spending a Fate Point to recover from Wounds, they recover an additional 1d5 Wounds.

specialAbilities.name: Faith in the Creed
specialAbilities.description: A shrine world character gains a +10 bonus to Fear Tests and when spending a Fate Point to recover from Wounds, they recover an additional 1d5 Wounds.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 6+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
